caption: Lila, a charismatic literature professor, glides through the frost-dusted campus courtyard, her fitted blouse catching the soft winter light as she adjusts her scarf with a playful smirk. Her pencil skirt accentuates her curves, and the amber glow of the setting sun casts a warm, sensual glow on her confident stride. ❄️💖 #UniversityGlamour #SexyTeacher #WinterChic #CampusVibes
